name: Yukina Shirahane
description: The daughter of the United Nations laboratory head.

name: Yuna Tsubakihara
description: The elder of the twins. Her following at school is so large that she has a fanclub, but is a bit shy.

name: Yuuto
description: Yuuto strongly resembles Yuya Sakaki; people often confuse him with Yuya, and the first time Yuzu Hiragi saw him, she thought he was Yuya in a costume. Yuuto and Yuya have nearly identical faces. Before revealing his identity, his name was displayed as Unknown on-screen and he was called the Dark Duelist in promotional materials and the Dark Masked Duelist by characters in the series. ~!He is the Xyz Dimensional counterpart of Yuya Sakaki (Standard Dimension), Yuugo (Synchro Dimension), and Yuur

name: Zaveid
description: __Height:__ 187 cm A seraph who utilizes wind-based seraphic artes and hunts hellions all alone. He tends to be frivolous and loose-lipped, but when the time comes, he displays unyielding skill and deportment. His true identity and purpose are not known, but he has an uncanny sense for battle and seems to relish a good fight with a formidable foe.
mediaTitles: Tales of Zestiria the X Season 2
searchTerms: Tales of Zestiria the X Season 2

name: Alex
description: Alex is the second-in-command in Ash's Gang.

name: Anju
description: The princess of Yamato and the only child of Mikado, the Emperor of Yamato and the god incarnate. She is worshipped by many in the kingdom, like her father. She is destined to one day succeed her father as the Mikado. She acts and speaks in an easygoing, willful, self-indulgent manner of a child of noble birth.

name: Arashi Spring
description: __Suppression Force Division:__ 538th Class __ID:__ NSA538201 __Height:__ 148 cm __Power:__ Hypervelocity __Weapon:__ Chainsaw

name: Beelzebub
description: The main protagonist, Beelzebub is the son of [Lucifer](https://anilist.co/character/331389) and thus the "Prince of the Underworld", he is usually referred to only as "Prince" by his fellow demons. Beelzebub (named after the biblical demon of the same name) lives in relative harmony with the humans. Although he regularly steals water from them, he only takes as much as he and his fellow demons need to survive. Joining [Sheriff Rao](https://anilist.co/character/13698) in his journey to give him

name: Canaria Utara
description: Canaria is the subhead of Tokyo City. Her self-professed title is "The Botherer to Suzaku." She is weak, and tries hard at everything she does. Her catchphrase is "When you're in trouble, smile." She activates her power by singing.

name: Carla Tsukinami
description: The founder of the vampires who possesses both intelligence and reason. However, he hides a secret sadistic violence underneath that. Within his long lifespan, he has a lazy and calm character.

name: Dabura Karaba
description: A Simurian of the Deskunte Tribe, who ended up escaping his planet with the Rumelian Tribe to save his sister. Dabura is calm, aloof, and emotionally detached from others, a distance shaped by his immense strength and isolation. Though he naturally emanates an intimidating, hostile presence, his true demeanor is markedly restrained.

name: Dark
description: Heart hitter's boss, Dark. His Grandfather owns a World scale corporation "Giga" and he is looking for him. He decided to hire HCLW to Power Level him.

name: Elmer C. Albatross
nativeName: エルマー・C・アルバトロス
description: One of the Advena Avis immortals. Elmer was born into a religious cult where the sole purpose of his existence was to be an object of abuse. He later moved to Lotto Valentino where he went to the same alchemy school as Huey and Monica. Elmer wants everyone in the world to be happy and have a smile on their face. He does not care what means he needs to use in order to achieve this and is consequently described by Huey as "pure evil to an absurd degree." Regardless, Huey considers him his only fri
searchTerms: エルマー・C・アルバトロス

name: Franceska Mila Rose
nativeName: フランチェスカ・ミラ・ローズ
description: Mila-Rose is a dark-skinned Arrancar who dresses like an Amazon warrior. She has large breasts, and a very toned body. Her mask fragments form a three-sectioned crown around her head and a thick necklace. Her Hollow hole is positioned midway between her navel and breasts. She is part of Tia Harribel's Fracción along with Sun-Sun and Apache

name: Genzo
description: __Height:__ 173 cm (5'8") __Occupations:__ Sheriff of Cocoyasi Village The sheriff and mayor of Cocoyashi Village (Coco Village in the 4kids version), which is Nami's home town. He is like a father figure to Nami and Nojiko since they were kids and he knew their adoptive mother, Bellemere, quite well. He also kept the town together after Arlong took over the island, making sure everyone was safe and able to pay their tax. Genzo wears a pinwheel on his hat because he used it to make Nami laugh wh

name: Gine
description: She is a female Saiyan, the wife of Bardock, and the mother of Raditz and Kakarrot (Gokuu). Like other Saiyans, her name is based on that of a vegetable; in this case, the spring onion (葱, negi in Japanese). Gokuu's mother is mentioned in the original Dragon Ball manga when Raditz tells Gokuu that their parents have died along with planet Vegeta, and later when Vegeta pleas for Freeza's destruction. The character was first introduced in an interview with Akira Toriyama in the March 2014 issue of

name: Gotou
description: Gotou is an "experimental" Parasite created by Reiko. He is actually composed of several combined Parasites, whose shapeshifting ability has advanced to the point where they can switch positions, each forming a different limb as the situation requires. Gotō is the most intelligent and skilled, and is the de facto leader of the composite body. Because his head and all of his limbs are made of Parasite cells, Gotō is much faster, stronger, and more dangerous than standard Parasites, and nearly imp

name: Guzma
description: He is the leader of Team Skull and specializes in Bug-type Pokémon. First appearance in SM115

name: Gyro
description: Gyro is the founder and the former king of NGL. As a human, he suffered an abusive childhood at the hands of his alcoholic father. His ambition is to spread evil throughout the world. ~!He is reborn as a chimera ant. Due to his strong will and pride, he quickly regains his human memories and ignores the queen's order !~

name: Haiga
description: A freshman in university. Moved from the countryside to study in the capital. (Source: Futekiya)

name: Haru Usami
description: Haru Usami is the main heroine of G-Senjou no Maou. She has long black hair and is extremely intelligent. Haru has a long history with Maou but is hesitant to tell anyone about it.
mediaTitles: The Devil on G-String Comic Anthology

name: Hinako Hasegawa
description: She is a childhood friend of Hajime and part of the photography club. She was forced into joining the club by Hajime so that they could meet the quota. She is an honor student who can handle anything and has a vast amount of knowledge. She wears her long hair in a braid. Ijuin and Tada are in the same class as her and since she is part of the student council, the members of the club call her 'student rep.'
